data.text/markdown:
BaSiC shading correction demo

This notebook demonstrates the basic usage of fit_basic_shading and apply_basic_shading. We artificially degrade the skimage.data.cells3d dataset and then recover the true intensities.

console.name: stdout
console.text:
Hint: labels_cmap background is transparent by default. To set it to black, run:
labels_cmap._init(); labels_cmap._lut[0] = [0, 0, 0, 1]
